content:
IVX ENTERPRISE INVESTOR PROTECTION SYSTEM

Build an enterprise-grade control system for all members, investors, JV partners, buyers, landowners, and tokenized investors.

========================
1. ACCOUNT RECOVERY
========================

• Forgot Password
• SMS verification
• Email verification
• Optional authenticator app (2FA)
• Admin-assisted recovery with full audit trail
• Session management (view and revoke active sessions)

Never permanently lock a verified investor out of their account.

========================
2. ACCOUNT DELETION PROTECTION
========================

Never permanently delete an account with financial records.

Instead:

• Active
• Suspended
• Locked
• Archived
• Closed

Deletion requires:
• Owner approval
• Second confirmation
• Audit log
• Reason
• Timestamp
• Operator identity

Financial history must remain immutable.

========================
3. INVESTOR WALLET
========================

Each investor has:

• Cash balance
• Pending deposits
• Pending withdrawals
• Investment balance
• Available balance
• Token balance (if applicable)
• Profit earned
• Profit paid
• Transaction history

========================
4. INVESTMENTS
========================

Support:

• Real estate investments
• JV deals
• Private lenders
• Tokenized investments

Each investment stores:

• Amount invested
• Ownership percentage
• Property/deal
• Current valuation
• Profit distribution
• Status
• Documents
• Signatures

========================
5. MONEY MOVEMENT
========================

Every movement must create a permanent ledger entry:

Deposit
Investment
Profit
Dividend
Withdrawal
Refund
Transfer
Fee
Correction

No ledger entry can be deleted.

========================
6. WITHDRAWAL WORKFLOW
========================

Investor requests withdrawal.

Workflow:

Request
↓

Compliance review
↓

Available balance verified
↓

Approval
↓

Wire initiated
↓

Wire confirmed
↓

Complete

Statuses:

Pending
Under Review
Approved
Rejected
Sent
Completed

========================
7. WIRE MANAGEMENT
========================

Store:

Bank name
Account holder
Routing
Account number
SWIFT
IBAN (if international)

Encrypted at rest.

Never display full account numbers after saving.

========================
8. OWNER CONTROLS
========================

Owner Dashboard:

Members
Investors
Buyers
JV Deals
Private Lenders
Tokenized Investments
Transactions
Withdrawals
Wire Queue
Compliance
Audit Logs
Support
KYC
AML
Reports

========================
9. AUDIT LOG
========================

Every action records:

User
Admin
IP
Device
Date
Time
Old value
New value
Reason

Nothing is deleted.

========================
10. SAFETY
========================

No account with money can be deleted.

No transaction can be deleted.

Only reversible administrative actions.

========================
11. COMPLIANCE
========================

Support:

KYC status
AML review
Accredited investor status
Identity verification
Document storage
Risk flags

========================
12. REPORTS
========================

Owner can see:

Total Members
Total Investors
Capital Raised
Capital Deployed
Pending Withdrawals
Pending Wires
Completed Wires
JV Capital
Tokenized Capital
Private Lender Capital
ROI by project
Profit distributions
